sections.paragraph:
Original: תּוּב

Transliteration: tûb

Phonetic: toob

BDB Definition:

  1. to return, come back
    1. (Peal) to return, come back
    2. (Aphel)
      1. to restore, give back, answer
      2. to return

Origin: corresponding to H7725, to come back

TWOT entry: 3053

Part(s) of speech: Verb
